translations.en: I'm getting my report card today.
translations.pt: Hoje vou receber o meu boletim.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi nhận bảng điểm.
translations.hi: आज मुझे रिपोर्ट कार्ड मिल रहा है।
translations.el: Σήμερα παίρνω το βαθμολογικό μου δελτίο.
translations.nb: I dag får jeg karakterkortet mitt.
translations.da: I dag får jeg mit karakterblad.
translations.ja: 今日は通知表をもらう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite present (1st person singular); denotes receiving; governs the direct object.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates the time of the action.
Possessive determiner marking ownership of the following noun (direct object).
Neuter noun functioning as the direct object (accusative) of the verb.

sentences.target: Du kannst mein Zeugnis kurz anschauen.

translations.de: Du kannst mein Zeugnis kurz anschauen.
translations.en: You can take a quick look at my report card.
translations.es: Puedes echar un vistazo rápido a mi boletín.
translations.fr: Tu peux jeter un coup d'œil rapide à mon bulletin.
translations.it: Puoi dare un'occhiata veloce alla mia pagella.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以稍微看一下我的成绩单。
translations.yue: 你可以快啲睇一睇我嘅成績表。
translations.ru: Можешь быстро взглянуть на мой табель.
translations.pt: Você pode dar uma olhada rápida no meu boletim.
translations.he: אתה יכול להציץ רגע בתעודה שלי.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể xem nhanh bảng điểm của tôi.
translations.ar: يمكنك إلقاء نظرة سريعة على كشف درجاتي.
translations.nl: Je kunt snel even naar mijn rapport kijken.
translations.uk: Ти можеш швидко глянути на мій табель.
translations.hi: तुम मेरा रिपोर्ट कार्ड जल्दी से देख सकते हो।
translations.pl: Możesz szybko zerknąć na moje świadectwo.
translations.el: Μπορείς να ρίξεις μια γρήγορη ματιά στο βαθμολογικό μου δελτίο.
translations.nb: Du kan ta en kjapp titt på karakterkortet mitt.
translations.sv: Du kan ta en snabb titt på mitt betyg.
translations.ro: Poți să arunci o privire rapidă la carnetul meu de note.
translations.cs: Můžeš se rychle podívat na moje vysvědčení.
translations.da: Du kan hurtigt kigge på mit karakterblad.
translations.ja: 私の通知表をちょっと見てもいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, finite present (2nd person singular); selects the infinitive 'anschauen'.
Possessive determiner marking ownership of the following noun (direct object of 'anschauen').
Neuter noun; direct object of the infinitive verb.
Manner adverb modifying 'anschauen'.
Infinitive main verb (separable verb 'an' + 'schauen', not split here due to modal); takes 'mein Zeugnis' as its object.

sentences.target: Sie braucht das Zeugnis für die Bewerbung.
sentences.reading: /ziː bʁaʊ̯xt das ˈtsɔʏ̯ɡnɪs fyːɐ diː bəˈvɛʁbʊŋ/

translations.de: Sie braucht das Zeugnis für die Bewerbung.
translations.ipa: /ziː bʁaʊ̯xt das ˈtsɔʏ̯ɡnɪs fyːɐ diː bəˈvɛʁbʊŋ/
translations.en: She needs the certificate for the application.
translations.es: Ella necesita el certificado para la solicitud.
translations.fr: Elle a besoin du certificat pour sa candidature.
translations.it: Le serve il certificato per la domanda.
translations.ru: Ей нужен сертификат для подачи заявления.
translations.pt: Ela precisa do certificado para a candidatura.
translations.he: היא צריכה את האישור בשביל הבקשה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy cần giấy chứng nhận cho hồ sơ.
translations.nl: Ze heeft het certificaat nodig voor de sollicitatie.
translations.hu: Neki szüksége van az igazolásra a jelentkezéshez.
translations.hi: उसे आवेदन के लिए प्रमाणपत्र चाहिए।
translations.el: Χρειάζεται το πιστοποιητικό για την αίτηση.
translations.ro: Are nevoie de certificat pentru candidatură.
translations.da: Hun har brug for certifikatet til ansøgningen.
translations.ja: 彼女は応募に証明書が必要だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite present (3rd person singular); takes a direct object.
Definite article introducing a neuter noun in accusative; marks the direct object.
Neuter noun functioning as the direct object of 'braucht'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating purpose.
Definite article introducing a feminine noun in accusative (required by 'für').
Feminine noun; object of the preposition 'für' (purpose: for the application).

sentences.target: Er zeigt der Oma stolz sein Zeugnis.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ tsaɪ̯kt deːɐ ˈoːma ʃtɔlts zaɪ̯n ˈtsɔʏ̯ɡnɪs/

translations.de: Er zeigt der Oma stolz sein Zeugnis.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ tsaɪ̯kt deːɐ ˈoːma ʃtɔlts zaɪ̯n ˈtsɔʏ̯ɡnɪs/
translations.en: He proudly shows his report card to Grandma.
translations.es: Él le muestra orgulloso su boletín a su abuela.
translations.fr: Il montre fièrement son bulletin à sa grand-mère.
translations.it: Lui mostra con orgoglio la sua pagella alla nonna.
translations.zh-Hans: 他得意地给奶奶看他的成绩单。
translations.yue: 佢自豪咁畀阿嫲睇佢嘅成績表。
translations.ru: Он с гордостью показывает бабушке свой табель.
translations.pt: Ele mostra orgulhoso seu boletim para a avó.
translations.he: הוא מראה בגאווה את התעודה שלו לסבתא.
translations.vi: Cậu ấy tự hào khoe bảng điểm với bà.
translations.nl: Hij laat trots zijn rapport aan oma zien.
translations.uk: Він з гордістю показує бабусі свій табель.
translations.hu: Büszkén megmutatja a bizonyítványát a nagymamának.
translations.hi: वह गर्व से अपना रिपोर्ट कार्ड दादी को दिखाता है।
translations.pl: On z dumą pokazuje babci swoje świadectwo.
translations.el: Δείχνει με περηφάνια το βαθμολογικό του δελτίο στη γιαγιά.
translations.nb: Han viser stolt karakterkortet sitt til bestemor.
translations.id: Dia dengan bangga menunjukkan rapornya kepada nenek.
translations.sv: Han visar stolt sitt betyg för mormor.
translations.ro: El își arată cu mândrie carnetul de note bunicii.
translations.cs: S hrdostí ukazuje babičce své vysvědčení.
translations.da: Han viser stolt sit karakterblad til mormor.
translations.ja: 彼はおばあちゃんに成績表を誇らしげに見せる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite present (3rd person singular); ditransitive: takes an indirect and a direct object.
Definite article, dative feminine; marks the indirect object.
Feminine noun; indirect object in dative governed by 'zeigt'.
Manner adverb modifying 'zeigt'; indicates the way the action is performed.
Possessive determiner marking ownership of the following noun (direct object).
Neuter noun; direct object (accusative) of 'zeigt'.

Él le muestra orgulloso su boletín a su abuela.

Il montre fièrement son bulletin à sa grand-mère.
